Name: Skill Speed Boost
Author: Jared
Description: Skill progression control: per-skill XP multipliers (0-10x), staleness decay (global or per-skill rate), morning XP bonus, area familiarity bonuses, difficulty presets (Balanced, Casual, Hardcore, etc.), skill synergies (combo XP for chaining related skills), and level-based XP scaling (higher bonus as skills approach max level).
